title: pleurospermum calophlebicum
intro: Pleurospermum calophlebicum, also known as the New Zealand angelica or Kawakawa, is a flowering plant native to the coastal regions of New Zealand. This plant has been used for centuries in traditional Maori medicine, with medicinal properties that include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Pleurospermum calophlebicum include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce pain and inflammation, and support digestive health, as well as its antioxidant and anti-aging properties. In herbal preparations, Pleurospermum calophlebicum is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
